summary: Completes profiler coverage for the green c2/c4/c8 auto equality path by tracing c4. The c4 run stays generated-token green and, like c8, uses the per-row full-attention context fallback rather than the native batch full-attention context kernel, so it remains correctness-only/non-retained.

Target: x86_64-pc-linux-gnu
Thread model: posix
InstalledDir: /opt/rocm/lib/llvm/bin

retained_claim_blockers: c4 profile confirms per-row full-attention fallback rather than native batch full-attention context
c4 path is explicitly not native c-aware decode
projection dispatch remains blocked for retained c>N rows; no throughput/scaling claim is made

commands.profile_c4: rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv -d /tmp/hipengine-e2e-native-auto-fullattn-profile-iter120-c4 -- env HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py ... --batch-size 4 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 8 --max-layers 40 --require-cached-build --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-native-auto-fullattn-profiled-iter120-c4.json
commands.active_verify: active loop verify command at clean commit d43d44f returned metric 137
commands.guard: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json
